  1030→async def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1031→    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
  1032→
  1033→    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
  1034→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
  1035→
  1036→    Args:
  1037→        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1038→
  1039→    Returns:
  1040→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1041→    """
  1042→    candidates = []
  1043→
  1044→    try:
  1045→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1046→    except Exception:
  1047→        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
  1048→
  1049→    try:
  1050→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1051→            const candidates = [];
  1052→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1053→
  1054→            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1055→            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1056→            const cardSelectors = [
  1057→                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1058→                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1059→                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1060→                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1061→                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1062→            ];
  1063→
  1064→            let cards = [];
  1065→            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1066→                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1067→                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1068→            }
  1069→
  1070→            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1071→            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1072→                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1073→                const foundCards = [];
  1074→
  1075→                for (const img of images) {
  1076→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1077→                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1078→                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1079→
  1080→                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1081→                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1082→                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1083→                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1084→                            break;
  1085→                        }
  1086→                        card = card.parentElement;
  1087→                    }
  1088→                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1089→                }
  1090→                cards = foundCards;
  1091→            }
  1092→
  1093→            for (const card of cards) {
  1094→                const textParts = [];
  1095→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1096→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1097→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1098→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1099→                        textParts.push(text);
  1100→                    }
  1101→                }
  1102→
  1103→                let name = '';
  1104→                let company = '';
  1105→                let title = '';
  1106→
  1107→                const skipPatterns = [
  1108→                    /^立即沟通$/,
  1109→                    /^不合适$/,
  1110→                    /^感兴趣$/,
  1111→                    /^不感兴趣$/,
  1112→                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?年/,
  1113→                    /^[|｜·]$/,
  1114→                    /^在线|^离线|^活跃/,
  1115→                ];
  1116→
  1117→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1118→                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1119→                };
  1120→
  1121→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1122→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1123→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1124→
  1125→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1126→                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1127→                            name = part;
  1128→                            continue;
  1129→                        }
  1130→                    }
  1131→
  1132→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1133→                        company = part;
  1134→                        continue;
  1135→                    }
  1136→
  1137→                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1138→                        title = part;
  1139→                        break;
  1140→                    }
  1141→                }
  1142→
  1143→                if (!name) continue;
  1144→
  1145→                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1146→                let hash = 0;
  1147→                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1148→                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1149→                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1150→                    hash = hash & hash;
  1151→                }
  1152→                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1153→
  1154→                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1155→                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1156→
  1157→                // Try to extract profile URL
  1158→                let profileUrl = '';
  1159→                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1160→                for (const link of links) {
  1161→                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1162→                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1163→                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1164→                        break;
  1165→                    }
  1166→                }
  1167→
  1168→                candidates.push({
  1169→                    name: name,
  1170→                    title: title || '',
  1171→                    company: company || '',
  1172→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1173→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1174→                    location: '',
  1175→                });
  1176→            }
  1177→
  1178→            return candidates;
  1179→        }''')
  1180→
  1181→        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1182→
  1183→        for data in candidates_data:
  1184→            if data.get("name"):
  1185→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1186→                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1187→                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1188→                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1189→                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1190→                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1191→                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1192→                ))
  1193→
  1194→        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1195→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1196→
  1197→        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1198→
  1199→    except Exception as e:
  1200→        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1201→
  1202→    return candidates

  1206→# Talent Bank recruitment path (Path C)

  1208→
  1209→TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL = "https://maimai.cn/ent/v41/index"

  1211→
  1212→async def search_candidates_talent_bank(
  1213→    keywords: str,
  1214→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
  1215→    pages: int = 1,
  1216→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
  1217→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
  1218→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1219→    """Search for candidates via the talent bank path.
  1220→
  1221→    Unlike enterprise search which opens a new tab, talent bank navigates
  1222→    the current tab in-place.  No tab cleanup is needed.
  1223→
  1224→    Flow:
  1225→    1. Navigate to enterprise entry -> click "招人" -> click "搜索" tab
  1226→    2. Input keywords in search box -> Enter
  1227→    3. Extract candidates from results
  1228→    4. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
  1229→
  1230→    Args:
  1231→        keywords: Search keywords
  1232→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
  1233→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
  1234→        browser: Browser manager instance
  1235→
  1236→    Returns:
  1237→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1238→    """
  1239→    validate_keywords(keywords)
  1240→
  1241→    if browser is None:
  1242→        browser = get_browser_manager()
  1243→
  1244→    config = get_config()
  1245→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
  1246→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
  1247→
  1248→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
  1249→
  1250→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
  1251→    seen_ids: set = set()
  1252→
  1253→    with Progress(
  1254→        SpinnerColumn(),
  1255→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
  1256→        console=console,
  1257→    ) as progress:
  1258→        task = progress.add_task("Opening talent bank...", total=None)
  1259→
  1260→        try:
  1261→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
  1262→
  1263→            page = browser.page
  1264→
  1265→            # Step 1: Navigate to talent bank entry
  1266→            progress.update(task, description="Navigating to talent bank...")
  1267→            await retry_navigation(page, TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
  1268→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1269→
  1270→            # Click "招人" to enter talent bank
  1271→            entry_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.entry_button")
  1272→            entry_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(entry_sel, timeout=8000)
  1273→            if not entry_btn:
  1274→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find talent bank entry: {entry_sel}")
  1275→            await entry_btn.click()
  1276→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1277→
  1278→            # Wait for talent bank URL
  1279→            try:
  1280→                await page.wait_for_url(
  1281→                    lambda url: "recruit/talents" in url,
  1282→                    timeout=15000,
  1283→                )
  1284→            except Exception:
  1285→                logger.warning(f"Talent bank URL not matched, current: {page.url}")
  1286→
  1287→            # Click "搜索" tab
  1288→            search_tab_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_tab")
  1289→            search_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(search_tab_sel, timeout=5000)
  1290→            if search_tab:
  1291→                await search_tab.click()
  1292→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1293→
  1294→            # Step 1.5: Set work years filter if requested
  1295→            if min_years:
  1296→                progress.update(task, description=f"Setting year filter: {min_years}+...")
  1297→                try:
  1298→                    year_filter = await page.wait_for_selector("text=工作年限", timeout=5000)
  1299→                    if year_filter:

1800→                        return true;
  1801→                    }
  1802→                }
  1803→
  1804→                // Strategy 2: If no bubble selectors matched, check direct children
  1805→                // that look like message blocks (not system tips)
  1806→                const children = container.children;
  1807→                let realChildCount = 0;
  1808→                for (const child of children) {
  1809→                    const text = child.textContent.trim();
  1810→                    // Must have meaningful content and not be a system message
  1811→                    if (text.length > 10 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1812→                        // Check it's not a timestamp-only or status-only element
  1813→                        if (child.querySelector('img[class*="avatar"]') || text.length > 20) {
  1814→                            realChildCount++;
  1815→                        }
  1816→                    }
  1817→                }
  1818→                if (realChildCount > 0) {
  1819→                    return true;
  1820→                }
  1821→            }
  1822→            return false;
  1823→        }"""
  1824→        )
  1825→
  1826→        if has_conversation:
  1827→            logger.info(f"Existing conversation detected for {maimai_id}")
  1828→        return has_conversation
  1829→
  1830→    except Exception as e:
  1831→        # On error, assume conversation exists (safe side: avoid duplicate messages)
  1832→        logger.warning(
  1833→            f"Conversation check failed for {maimai_id}: {e} — assuming existing conversation"
  1834→        )
  1835→        return True

  1838→def _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
  1839→    """Get candidate info from database."""
  1840→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1841→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1842→        if candidate:
  1843→            return {
  1844→                "name": candidate.name,
  1845→                "title": candidate.title,
  1846→                "company": candidate.company,
  1847→            }
  1848→        return None
  1849→
  1850→
  1851→def _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id: str, template_name: str, content: str, status: str) -> None:
  1852→    """Log message to database. Creates a minimal Candidate if needed for FK."""
  1853→    try:
  1854→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1855→            # Ensure candidate exists for FK constraint
  1856→            existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1857→            if not existing:
  1858→                session.add(Candidate(maimai_id=maimai_id))
  1859→                session.flush()
  1860→
  1861→            message = Message(
  1862→                candidate_maimai_id=maimai_id,
  1863→                template_name=template_name,
  1864→                content=content,
  1865→                status=status,
  1866→                sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == "sent" else None,
  1867→            )
  1868→            session.add(message)
  1869→            logger.debug(f"Logged message to {maimai_id}: {status}")
  1870→    except Exception as e:
  1871→        logger.warning(
  1872→            f"AUDIT FAILURE: Failed to log message to {maimai_id} (status={status}): {e}. "
  1873→            f"This candidate may be re-messaged on next run."
  1874→        )
  1875→        # For sent messages, audit failure is critical — re-raise to prevent
  1876→        # silent duplicate messaging on the next pipeline run.
  1877→        if status == "sent":
  1878→            raise
  1879→
  1880→

  1886→async def _close_enterprise_popup(page: Page) -> None:
  1887→    """Close popup/modal that appears after sending a message in enterprise flow."""
  1888→    config = get_config()
  1889→
  1890→    # Try close popup image first
  1891→    close_img_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.close_popup_img")
  1892→    try:
  1893→        close_img = await page.wait_for_selector(close_img_sel, timeout=3000)
  1894→        if close_img:
  1895→            await close_img.click()
  1896→            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
  1897→    except Exception:
  1898→        pass  # Popup may not exist; best-effort
  1899→
  1900→    # Try close modal button
  1901→    close_modal_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.close_modal")
  1902→    try:
  1903→        close_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(close_modal_sel, timeout=2000)
  1904→        if close_btn:
  1905→            await close_btn.click()
  1906→            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
  1907→    except Exception:
  1908→        pass  # Modal may not exist; best-effort

  1911→async def send_message_enterprise_inline(
  1912→    page: Page,
  1913→    content: str,
  1914→    config=None,
  1915→) -> bool:
  1916→    """Send a message inline on the enterprise recruitment page.
  1917→
  1918→    This operates on the current visible candidate card — clicks "立即沟通",
  1919→    types the message in the textarea, clicks "发送后留在此页", and closes
  1920→    the popup.
  1921→
  1922→    Args:
  1923→        page: Playwright page on the enterprise results page
  1924→        content: Message content to send
  1925→        config: Config instance (loaded if None)
  1926→
  1927→    Returns:
  1928→        True if message was sent successfully
  1929→    """
  1930→    if config is None:
  1931→        config = get_config()
  1932→
  1933→    try:
  1934→        # Click 立即沟通
  1935→        chat_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.chat_now_button")
  1936→        chat_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
  1937→        if not chat_btn:
  1938→            logger.warning("Enterprise: 立即沟通 button not found")
  1939→            return False
  1940→
  1941→        await human_click(page, chat_sel)
  1942→        await async_random_delay("action")
  1943→
  1944→        # Wait for message textarea
  1945→        textarea_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.message_textarea")
  1946→        textarea = await page.wait_for_selector(textarea_sel, timeout=5000)
  1947→        if not textarea:
  1948→            logger.warning("Enterprise: message textarea not found")
  1949→            return False
  1950→
  1951→        # Clear any default text and type message
  1952→        await textarea.click()
  1953→        select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
  1954→        await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
  1955→        await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
  1956→        await human_type(page, textarea_sel, content)
  1957→        await async_random_delay("action")
  1958→
  1959→        # Click 发送后留在此页
  1960→        send_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.send_stay_button")
  1961→        send_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(send_sel, timeout=5000)
  1962→        if not send_btn:
  1963→            logger.warning("Enterprise: send button not found")
  1964→            return False
  1965→
  1966→        await human_click(page, send_sel)
  1967→        await async_random_delay("action")
  1968→
  1969→        # Close popup/modal
  1970→        await _close_enterprise_popup(page)
  1971→
  1972→        # Verify message was actually sent
  1973→        verified = await _verify_message_sent(page, content)
  1974→        if not verified:
  1975→            logger.warning("Enterprise: message send could not be verified")
  1976→            return False
  1977→
  1978→        logger.info("Enterprise: message sent and verified inline")
  1979→        return True
  1980→
  1981→    except Exception as e:
  1982→        logger.error(f"Enterprise inline send failed: {e}")
  1983→        return False
  1984→

  2024→async def _find_im_chat_frame(im_page: Page):
  2025→    """Find the chat iframe inside an IM tab page.
  2026→
  2027→    The IM page embeds the actual chat UI in an iframe with URL
  2028→    pattern: /chat?fr=ent&in_iframe=1&...
  2029→
  2030→    Returns:
  2031→        The chat Frame, or None if not found.
  2032→    """
  2033→    for frame in im_page.frames:
  2034→        if "chat?" in frame.url and "in_iframe" in frame.url:
  2035→            return frame
  2036→    return None
  2037→
  2038→
  2039→async def _exchange_in_im_tab(
  2040→    browser: "BrowserManager",
  2041→    config,
  2042→    exchange_phone: bool,
  2043→    exchange_wechat: bool,
  2044→) -> None:
  2045→    """Switch to the IM tab and click exchange phone/WeChat buttons.
  2046→
  2047→    The exchange buttons live inside a chat iframe within the IM tab.
  2048→    Each button is a ``div.tool.normal`` with a ``.tool-text`` child
  2049→    whose text is "交换电话" or "交换微信".  After clicking, the button
  2050→    state changes to ``div.tool.disable`` ("申请中" / "交换中").
  2051→
  2052→    Args:
  2053→        browser: BrowserManager with open IM tab
  2054→        config: Config instance
  2055→        exchange_phone: Click "交换手机"
  2056→        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信"
  2057→    """
  2058→    # Find the IM tab (URL contains /im, /direct_modal, or /chat paths)
  2059→    im_page = None
  2060→    for p in browser.context.pages:
  2061→        url = p.url.lower()
  2062→        if (
  2063→            "/im" in url or "direct_modal" in url or "/chat" in url or "uh_chat" in url
  2064→        ) and p != browser.page:
  2065→            im_page = p
  2066→            logger.debug(f"Talent bank exchange: found IM tab: {p.url}")
  2067→            break
  2068→
  2069→    if not im_page:
  2070→        all_urls = [p.url for p in browser.context.pages]
  2071→        logger.warning(f"Talent bank exchange: IM tab not found. Open tabs: {all_urls}")
  2072→        return
  2073→
  2074→    try:
  2075→        # Wait for iframe to load
  2076→        await im_page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=8000)
  2077→        await im_page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
  2078→
  2079→        chat_frame = await _find_im_chat_frame(im_page)
  2080→        if not chat_frame:
  2081→            logger.warning("Talent bank exchange: chat iframe not found")
  2082→            return
  2083→
  2084→        # Use JS evaluate inside iframe for reliable clicking (Playwright
  2085→        # complex selectors like :has(:text-is()) can silently fail in iframes)
  2086→        async def _click_tool_btn(frame, btn_text: str) -> bool:
  2087→            """Click a div.tool.normal button by its .tool-text content in the iframe."""
  2088→            return await frame.evaluate(
  2089→                """(btnText) => {
  2090→                const tools = document.querySelectorAll('div.tool.normal');
  2091→                for (const tool of tools) {
  2092→                    const textEl = tool.querySelector('.tool-text');
  2093→                    if (textEl && textEl.textContent.trim() === btnText) {
  2094→                        tool.click();
  2095→                        return true;
  2096→                    }
  2097→                }
  2098→                return false;
  2099→            }""",
  2100→                btn_text,
  2101→            )
  2102→
  2103→        if exchange_phone:
  2104→            try:
  2105→                clicked = await _click_tool_btn(chat_frame, "交换手机")
  2106→                if clicked:
  2107→                    logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换手机")
  2108→                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
  2109→                else:
  2110→                    logger.debug("Talent bank: 交换手机 button not found or disabled")
  2111→            except Exception as e:
  2112→                logger.debug(f"Talent bank: exchange phone failed: {e}")
  2113→
  2114→        if exchange_wechat:
  2115→            try:
  2116→                clicked = await _click_tool_btn(chat_frame, "交换微信")
  2117→                if clicked:
  2118→                    # WeChat exchange shows a confirmation dialog (a.confirm)
  2119→                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
  2120→                    confirmed = await chat_frame.evaluate(
  2121→                        """() => {
  2122→                        const btn = document.querySelector('a.confirm');
  2123→                        if (btn) { btn.click(); return true; }
  2124→                        return false;
  2125→                    }"""
  2126→                    )
  2127→                    if confirmed:
  2128→                        logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换微信 + confirmed")
  2129→                    else:
  2130→                        logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换微信 (no confirm dialog)")
  2131→                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
  2132→                else:
  2133→                    logger.debug("Talent bank: 交换微信 button not found or disabled")
  2134→            except Exception as e:
  2135→                logger.debug(f"Talent bank: exchange wechat failed: {e}")
  2136→
  2137→    except Exception as e:
  2138→        logger.error(f"Talent bank exchange error: {e}")
  2139→

  2141→async def _close_im_tabs(browser: "BrowserManager", search_page: Page) -> None:
  2142→    """Close all IM tabs, keeping the search page."""
  2143→    try:
  2144→        for p in list(browser.context.pages):
  2145→            if p != search_page and ("im" in p.url or "direct_modal" in p.url):
  2146→                await p.close()
  2147→                await search_page.wait_for_timeout(500)
  2148→    except Exception as e:
  2149→        logger.debug(f"Talent bank: IM tab cleanup: {e}")
  2150→

  2152→async def send_message_talent_bank_inline(
  2153→    page: Page,
  2154→    content: str,
  2155→    browser: "BrowserManager",
  2156→    config=None,
  2157→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
  2158→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
  2159→    chat_btn_handle=None,
  2160→) -> bool:
  2161→    """Send a message inline on the talent bank page, optionally exchange phone/WeChat.
  2162→
  2163→    Clicks "立即沟通" on the current candidate card, optionally fills a custom
  2164→    message in the textarea, then clicks "发送后继续沟通".  A new IM tab opens
  2165→    after sending.  If exchange_phone or exchange_wechat is True, switches to the
  2166→    IM tab and clicks the exchange buttons in the chat iframe before closing.
  2167→
  2168→    Args:
  2169→        page: Playwright page on the talent bank results page
  2170→        content: Message content to send
  2171→        browser: BrowserManager for tab management
  2172→        config: Config instance (loaded if None)
  2173→        exchange_phone: Click "交换电话" in IM tab after sending
  2174→        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信" in IM tab after sending
  2175→        chat_btn_handle: Pre-located "立即沟通" button element handle (avoids clicking wrong card)
  2176→
  2177→    Returns:
  2178→        True if message was sent successfully
  2179→    """
  2180→    if config is None:
  2181→        config = get_config()
  2182→
  2183→    try:
  2184→        # Click 立即沟通 (use pre-located handle if available to avoid wrong card)
  2185→        if chat_btn_handle:
  2186→            await chat_btn_handle.click()
  2187→        else:
  2188→            chat_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.chat_now_button")
  2189→            chat_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
  2190→            if not chat_btn:
  2191→                logger.warning("Talent bank: 立即沟通 button not found")
  2192→                return False
  2193→            await human_click(page, chat_sel)
  2194→        await async_random_delay("action")
  2195→
  2196→        # Try to fill custom message in textarea (if dialog has one)
  2197→        textarea_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.message_textarea")
  2198→        try:
  2199→            textarea = await page.wait_for_selector(textarea_sel, timeout=3000)
  2200→            if textarea:
  2201→                # Force-set value via native setter to bypass React controlled state
  2202→                # (platform may pre-fill candidate name; fill() can merge instead of replace)
  2203→                await textarea.evaluate(
  2204→                    """(el, text) => {
  2205→                    const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(
  2206→                        HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value'
  2207→                    ).set;
  2208→                    setter.call(el, '');
  2209→                    el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  2210→                    setter.call(el, text);
  2211→                    el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  2212→                    el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
  2213→                }""",
  2214→                    content,
  2215→                )
  2216→                await async_random_delay("action")
  2217→        except Exception:
  2218→            logger.debug(
  2219→                "Talent bank: no message textarea found, platform default greeting will be used"
  2220→            )
  2221→
  2222→        # Click 发送后继续沟通
  2223→        send_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.send_continue_button")
  2224→        send_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(send_sel, timeout=5000)
  2225→        if not send_btn:
  2226→            logger.warning("Talent bank: send button not found")
  2227→            return False
  2228→
  2229→        await human_click(page, send_sel)
  2230→        await async_random_delay("action")
  2231→
  2232→        # Wait for IM tab to open (after clicking "发送后继续沟通")
  2233→        im_open_ms = config.get("timings.im_tab_open_wait_ms", 3000)
  2234→        await page.wait_for_timeout(im_open_ms)
  2235→
  2236→        # If expecting exchange but no new tab yet, wait a bit longer
  2237→        if (exchange_phone or exchange_wechat) and len(browser.context.pages) <= 1:
  2238→            logger.debug("Talent bank: no new tab yet, waiting extra 3s for IM tab...")
  2239→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
  2240→
  2241→        # --- Exchange phone/WeChat in the IM tab ---
  2242→        if (exchange_phone or exchange_wechat) and len(browser.context.pages) > 1:
  2243→            await _exchange_in_im_tab(browser, config, exchange_phone, exchange_wechat)
  2244→
  2245→        # Close IM tabs
  2246→        await _close_im_tabs(browser, page)
  2247→
  2248→        # Close any modal/popup on search page
  2249→        close_modal_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.close_modal")
  2250→        try:
  2251→            close_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(close_modal_sel, timeout=2000)
  2252→            if close_btn:
  2253→                await close_btn.click()
  2254→                await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
  2255→        except Exception as e:
  2256→            logger.debug(f"Talent bank: close modal best-effort failed: {e}")
  2257→
  2258→        logger.info("Talent bank: message sent inline")
  2259→        return True
  2260→
  2261→    except Exception as e:
  2262→        logger.error(f"Talent bank inline send failed: {e}")
  2263→        return False
  2264→

1→"""Retry utilities for navigation and network operations."""
     2→
     3→from tenacity import retry, stop_after_attempt, wait_exponential, retry_if_exception_type
     4→from patchright.async_api import Page, Error as PlaywrightError
     5→from loguru import logger
     6→
     7→
     8→@retry(
     9→    stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
    10→    wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10),
    11→    retry=retry_if_exception_type((PlaywrightError, TimeoutError, ConnectionError)),
    12→    before_sleep=lambda retry_state: logger.warning(
    13→        f"Navigation failed (attempt {retry_state.attempt_number}), retrying..."
    14→    ),
    15→    reraise=True,
    16→)
    17→async def retry_navigation(page: Page, url: str, **kwargs) -> None:
    18→    """Navigate to a URL with automatic retry on failure.
    19→
    20→    Args:
    21→        page: Playwright page instance
    22→        url: URL to navigate to
    23→        **kwargs: Additional arguments passed to page.goto()
    24→    """
    25→    await page.goto(url, **kwargs)
    26→

1→"""Smart filtering utilities for candidates.
     2→
     3→自动过滤低质量候选人，提升搜索效率。
     4→"""
     5→
     6→from typing import List
     7→from loguru import logger
     8→
     9→
    10→def is_recruiter(title: str) -> bool:
    11→    """
    12→    判断是否是 HR/猎头.
    13→
    14→    Args:
    15→        title: 职位名称
    16→
    17→    Returns:
    18→        True if is recruiter
    19→    """
    20→    if not title:
    21→        return False
    22→
    23→    title_lower = title.lower()
    24→    hr_keywords = [
    25→        '招聘', 'hr', 'hrbp', '人力', '猎头', 'recruiter',
    26→        'headhunter', '人事', 'talent acquisition',
    27→        'hr manager', 'hr director', '人力资源',
    28→    ]
    29→
    30→    return any(kw in title_lower for kw in hr_keywords)
    31→
    32→
    33→
    34→def filter_candidates(
    35→    candidates: List[dict],
    36→    auto_filter: bool = True,
    37→    include_recruiters: bool = False
    38→) -> List[dict]:
    39→    """
    40→    智能过滤候选人列表.
    41→
    42→    Args:
    43→        candidates: List of candidate dicts
    44→        auto_filter: Enable auto filtering (default True)
    45→        include_recruiters: If True, don't filter out recruiters
    46→
    47→    Returns:
    48→        Filtered candidate list
    49→    """
    50→    if not auto_filter:
    51→        return candidates
    52→
    53→    filtered = []
    54→    stats = {
    55→        'hash_id': 0,
    56→        'incomplete': 0,
    57→        'recruiter': 0,
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    for c in candidates:
    61→        # Check ID
    62→        if not c.get('maimai_id', '').startswith('mm_'):
    63→            stats['hash_id'] += 1
    64→            continue
    65→
    66→        # Check completeness
    67→        if not c.get('name') or not c.get('title') or not c.get('company'):
    68→            stats['incomplete'] += 1
    69→            continue
    70→
    71→        # Check recruiter
    72→        if not include_recruiters and is_recruiter(c.get('title', '')):
    73→            stats['recruiter'] += 1
    74→            continue
    75→
    76→        filtered.append(c)
    77→
    78→    if len(filtered) < len(candidates):
    79→        logger.info(
    80→            f"Auto-filter: {len(candidates)} → {len(filtered)} candidates "
    81→            f"(removed: {stats['hash_id']} hash ID, {stats['incomplete']} incomplete, "
    82→            f"{stats['recruiter']} recruiters)"
    83→        )
    84→
    85→    return filtered
    86→

1→"""Candidate scoring for priority-based messaging.
     2→
     3→Scores candidates based on title seniority, company tier, and keyword
     4→relevance so that the best-fit candidates get contacted first.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import re
     8→from typing import Dict, List, Optional
     9→
    10→from loguru import logger
    11→
    12→
    13→# Seniority keywords and their score weights
    14→SENIORITY_SCORES: Dict[str, int] = {
    15→    # C-level
    16→    "CTO": 50, "CEO": 40, "COO": 35, "VP": 40,
    17→    "首席": 45, "总裁": 40, "副总裁": 40,
    18→    # Director
    19→    "总监": 35, "技术总监": 40,
    20→    # Senior management
    21→    "技术负责人": 35, "负责人": 30, "Tech Lead": 35,
    22→    # Senior individual contributors
    23→    "架构师": 35, "专家": 30, "staff": 30, "Staff": 30,
    24→    "principal": 35, "Principal": 35,
    25→    "资深": 25, "高级": 20, "Senior": 20, "senior": 20,
    26→    # Mid-level
    27→    "经理": 15, "主管": 15, "lead": 15, "Lead": 15,
    28→    "中级": 10,
    29→    # Junior
    30→    "初级": 5, "Junior": 5, "junior": 5,
    31→    "助理": 3, "实习": 1,
    32→}
    33→
    34→# Well-known tech companies (tier 1)
    35→TIER1_COMPANIES = {
    36→    "字节跳动", "ByteDance", "腾讯", "Tencent", "阿里巴巴", "阿里", "Alibaba",
    37→    "百度", "Baidu", "美团", "Meituan", "京东", "JD", "拼多多", "PDD",
    38→    "华为", "Huawei", "小米", "Xiaomi", "网易", "NetEase", "快手", "Kwai",
    39→    "蚂蚁集团", "蚂蚁金服", "滴滴", "DiDi",
    40→    "Google", "谷歌", "Microsoft", "微软", "Apple", "苹果",
    41→    "Amazon", "亚马逊", "Meta", "Facebook",
    42→    "Netflix", "Uber", "OpenAI", "Anthropic",
    43→}
    44→
    45→# Good tech companies (tier 2)
    46→TIER2_COMPANIES = {
    47→    "携程", "Trip.com", "B站", "bilibili", "哔哩哔哩",
    48→    "知乎", "Zhihu", "小红书", "得物", "SHEIN",
    49→    "商汤", "旷视", "依图", "寒武纪", "地平线",
    50→    "理想汽车", "蔚来", "小鹏", "大疆", "DJI",
    51→    "米哈游", "miHoYo", "莉莉丝", "叠纸",
    52→    "360", "新浪", "微博", "搜狐", "爱奇艺",
    53→    "OPPO", "vivo", "一加", "联想", "Lenovo",
    54→    "SAP", "Oracle", "IBM", "Adobe", "Salesforce",
    55→    "Stripe", "Airbnb", "Spotify", "Twitter", "X",
    56→}
    57→
    58→
    59→def score_candidate(
    60→    name: str,
    61→    title: str,
    62→    company: str,
    63→    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    64→) -> int:
    65→    """
    66→    Score a candidate based on title, company, and keyword relevance.
    67→
    68→    Higher score = higher priority for messaging.
    69→
    70→    Scoring breakdown:
    71→    - Title seniority: 0-50 points
    72→    - Company tier: 0-30 points
    73→    - Keyword match: 0-20 points
    74→
    75→    Args:
    76→        name: Candidate name
    77→        title: Job title
    78→        company: Company name
    79→        search_keywords: Original search keywords for relevance scoring
    80→
    81→    Returns:
    82→        Integer score (higher = better fit)
    83→    """
    84→    score = 0
    85→
    86→    # 1. Title seniority scoring
    87→    title_lower = title.lower() if title else ""
    88→    best_seniority = 0
    89→    for keyword, points in SENIORITY_SCORES.items():
    90→        if keyword.lower() in title_lower or keyword in title:
    91→            best_seniority = max(best_seniority, points)
    92→    score += best_seniority
    93→
    94→    # 2. Company tier scoring
    95→    # Require minimum 2 characters on both sides to avoid false positives
    96→    # from short names like "X", "JD" matching substrings of unrelated companies
    97→    if company:
    98→        company_lower = company.lower()
    99→        company_matched = False
   100→        for t1 in TIER1_COMPANIES:
   101→            t1_lower = t1.lower()
   102→            if len(t1_lower) >= 2 and len(company_lower) >= 2:
   103→                if t1_lower == company_lower or (len(t1_lower) >= 3 and t1_lower in company_lower) or (len(company_lower) >= 3 and company_lower in t1_lower):
   104→                    score += 30
   105→                    company_matched = True
   106→                    break
   107→        if not company_matched:
   108→            for t2 in TIER2_COMPANIES:
   109→                t2_lower = t2.lower()
   110→                if len(t2_lower) >= 2 and len(company_lower) >= 2:
   111→                    if t2_lower == company_lower or (len(t2_lower) >= 3 and t2_lower in company_lower) or (len(company_lower) >= 3 and company_lower in t2_lower):
   112→                        score += 20
   113→                        break
   114→
   115→    # 3. Keyword relevance (if search keywords provided), capped at 20 points
   116→    if search_keywords and title:
   117→        keyword_score = 0
   118→        for kw in search_keywords:
   119→            kw_lower = kw.lower()
   120→            if kw_lower in title_lower:
   121→                keyword_score += 10
   122→            elif kw_lower in (company or "").lower():
   123→                keyword_score += 5
   124→        score += min(keyword_score, 20)
   125→
   126→    # 4. Bonus: R&D-specific titles
   127→    rd_bonus_patterns = [
   128→        r"工程师", r"开发", r"架构", r"算法", r"研发",
   129→        r"engineer", r"developer", r"architect",
   130→    ]
   131→    for pattern in rd_bonus_patterns:
   132→        if re.search(pattern, title, re.IGNORECASE):
   133→            score += 5
   134→            break
   135→
   136→    return score
   137→
   138→
   139→def sort_candidates_by_score(
   140→    candidates: list,
   141→    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   142→) -> list:
   143→    """
   144→    Sort a list of candidate dicts or objects by score (descending).
   145→
   146→    Works with both CandidateBasic dataclass instances and dicts.
   147→
   148→    Args:
   149→        candidates: List of candidates (dicts or objects with name/title/company)
   150→        search_keywords: Original search keywords for relevance scoring
   151→
   152→    Returns:
   153→        Sorted list (highest score first), each item gets a 'score' attribute/key
   154→    """
   155→    scored = []
   156→    for c in candidates:
   157→        if isinstance(c, dict):
   158→            name = c.get("name", "")
   159→            title = c.get("title", "")
   160→            company = c.get("company", "")
   161→        else:
   162→            name = getattr(c, "name", "")
   163→            title = getattr(c, "title", "")
   164→            company = getattr(c, "company", "")
   165→
   166→        s = score_candidate(name, title, company, search_keywords)
   167→
   168→        if isinstance(c, dict):
   169→            c["_score"] = s
   170→        else:
   171→            c.score = s
   172→
   173→        scored.append((s, c))
   174→
   175→    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
   176→
   177→    result = [item[1] for item in scored]
   178→
   179→    if result:
   180→        top = scored[0][0]
   181→        bottom = scored[-1][0]
   182→        logger.info(f"Candidates scored: top={top}, bottom={bottom}, count={len(result)}")
   183→
   184→    return result
   185→

1→"""Session management for persistent browser sessions.
     2→
     3→Handles saving and loading browser sessions (cookies, localStorage)
     4→to enable resuming without re-login.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import json
     8→import os
     9→import stat
    10→import tempfile
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    13→from typing import Optional
    14→
    15→from cryptography.fernet import Fernet
    16→from patchright.async_api import BrowserContext
    17→from loguru import logger
    18→
    19→from src.utils.config import get_config
    20→
    21→
    22→class SessionManager:
    23→    """Manages browser session persistence."""
    24→
    25→    def __init__(self, session_path: Optional[str] = None):
    26→        """
    27→        Initialize session manager.
    28→
    29→        Args:
    30→            session_path: Path to session file. Uses config default if None.
    31→        """
    32→        if session_path is None:
    33→            config = get_config()
    34→            session_path = config.get('data.session_path', 'data/.session/maimai_session.json')
    35→
    36→        self.session_path = Path(session_path)
    37→        self._key_path = self.session_path.parent / '.session_key'
    38→        self._fernet: Optional[Fernet] = None
    39→        self._ensure_session_dir()
    40→
    41→    def _ensure_session_dir(self) -> None:
    42→        """Ensure session directory exists with restrictive permissions."""
    43→        session_dir = self.session_path.parent
    44→        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    45→        # Restrict directory to owner only (rwx------)
    46→        try:
    47→            os.chmod(session_dir, stat.S_IRWXU)
    48→        except OSError:
    49→            logger.warning("Could not set restrictive permissions on session directory")
    50→
    51→    def _get_fernet(self) -> Fernet:
    52→        """Get or create Fernet encryption instance."""
    53→        if self._fernet is not None:
    54→            return self._fernet
    55→
    56→        if self._key_path.exists():
    57→            key = self._key_path.read_bytes().strip()
    58→        else:
    59→            key = Fernet.generate_key()
    60→            # Write key with owner-only permissions
    61→            fd = os.open(str(self._key_path), os.O_WRONLY | os.O_CREAT | os.O_TRUNC, 0o600)
    62→            try:
    63→                os.write(fd, key)
    64→            finally:
    65→                os.close(fd)
    66→
    67→        self._fernet = Fernet(key)
    68→        return self._fernet
    69→
    70→    def _decrypt_session_data(self) -> dict:
    71→        """Decrypt and parse the stored session file.
    72→
    73→        Returns:
    74→            Parsed session data dict.
    75→
    76→        Raises:
    77→            Exception: If decryption or JSON parsing fails.
    78→        """
    79→        encrypted = self.session_path.read_bytes()
    80→        plaintext = self._get_fernet().decrypt(encrypted)
    81→        return json.loads(plaintext.decode('utf-8'))
    82→
    83→    def _write_secure(self, path: Path, data: bytes) -> None:
    84→        """Atomically write data to file with owner-only permissions (0600).
    85→
    86→        Writes to a temp file first, then renames to target path so that
    87→        a crash mid-write never corrupts the existing file.
    88→        """
    89→        tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(dir=str(path.parent), suffix=".tmp")
    90→        try:
    91→            os.write(tmp_fd, data)
    92→            os.close(tmp_fd)
    93→            tmp_fd = -1  # mark as closed
    94→            os.chmod(tmp_path, 0o600)
    95→            os.replace(tmp_path, str(path))
    96→        except BaseException:
    97→            if tmp_fd >= 0:
    98→                os.close(tmp_fd)
    99→            try:
   100→                os.unlink(tmp_path)
   101→            except OSError:
   102→                pass
   103→            raise
   104→
   105→    def has_saved_session(self) -> bool:
   106→        """
   107→        Check if a saved session exists.
   108→
   109→        Returns:
   110→            True if session file exists
   111→        """
   112→        return self.session_path.exists()
   113→
   114→    async def save(self, context: BrowserContext) -> None:
   115→        """
   116→        Save browser session state.
   117→
   118→        Args:
   119→            context: Playwright browser context
   120→        """
   121→        try:
   122→            # Get storage state (cookies + localStorage)
   123→            storage_state = await context.storage_state()
   124→
   125→            # Add metadata
   126→            session_data = {
   127→                'saved_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
   128→                'storage_state': storage_state
   129→            }
   130→
   131→            # Encrypt and write with restrictive permissions
   132→            plaintext = json.dumps(session_data, ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8')
   133→            encrypted = self._get_fernet().encrypt(plaintext)
   134→            self._write_secure(self.session_path, encrypted)
   135→
   136→            logger.info(f"Session saved (encrypted) to {self.session_path}")
   137→
   138→        except Exception as e:
   139→            logger.error(f"Failed to save session: {e}")
   140→            raise
   141→
   142→    async def clear(self) -> None:
   143→        """Clear saved session and encryption key."""
   144→        if self.session_path.exists():
   145→            self.session_path.unlink()
   146→            logger.info("Session cleared")
   147→
   148→        # Also clear storage state file if exists
   149→        state_path = self.session_path.parent / 'storage_state.json'
   150→        if state_path.exists():
   151→            state_path.unlink()
   152→
   153→        # Remove encryption key so a fresh one is generated next time
   154→        if self._key_path.exists():
   155→            self._key_path.unlink()
   156→        self._fernet = None
   157→
   158→    def get_session_info(self) -> Optional[dict]:
   159→        """
   160→        Get information about saved session.
   161→
   162→        Returns:
   163→            Dict with session metadata or None if no session
   164→        """
   165→        if not self.has_saved_session():
   166→            return None
   167→
   168→        try:
   169→            session_data = self._decrypt_session_data()
   170→
   171→            saved_at = session_data.get('saved_at')
   172→            storage_state = session_data.get('storage_state', {})
   173→            cookies = storage_state.get('cookies', [])
   174→
   175→            # Calculate age
   176→            if saved_at:
   177→                saved_datetime = datetime.fromisoformat(saved_at)
   178→                if saved_datetime.tzinfo is None:
   179→                    saved_datetime = saved_datetime.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   180→                age = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - saved_datetime
   181→                age_str = f"{age.days}d {age.seconds // 3600}h"
   182→            else:
   183→                age_str = "unknown"
   184→
   185→            return {
   186→                'saved_at': saved_at,
   187→                'age': age_str,
   188→                'cookie_count': len(cookies),
   189→            }
   190→
   191→        except Exception as e:
   192→            logger.error(f"Failed to get session info: {e}")
   193→            return None
   194→
   195→
   196→# Global session manager instance
   197→_session_manager = None
   198→
   199→
   200→def get_session_manager() -> SessionManager:
   201→    """Get global session manager instance."""
   202→    global _session_manager
   203→    if _session_manager is None:
   204→        _session_manager = SessionManager()
   205→    return _session_manager
   206→

1→"""Custom exceptions for Maimai Assistant."""
     2→
     3→
     4→class MaimaiAssistantError(Exception):
     5→    """Base exception for all Maimai Assistant errors."""
     6→    pass
     7→
     8→
     9→class BrowserError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    10→    """Raised when browser automation fails."""
    11→    pass
    12→
    13→
    14→class SessionExpiredError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    15→    """Raised when Maimai session has expired."""
    16→    pass
    17→
    18→
    19→class LoginRequiredError(SessionExpiredError):
    20→    """Raised when user needs to manually log in."""
    21→
    22→    def __init__(self, cdp_endpoint: str = "http://localhost:9222"):
    23→        super().__init__(
    24→            "检测到未登录状态，请执行以下步骤:\n"
    25→            f"1. 确保 Chrome 正在运行 (CDP 端口: {cdp_endpoint})\n"
    26→            "   /Applications/Google\\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\\ Chrome \\\n"
    27→            f"     --remote-debugging-port={cdp_endpoint.split(':')[-1]} \\\n"
    28→            "     --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-debug-profile\n"
    29→            "2. 在 Chrome 中访问 https://maimai.cn 并完成登录\n"
    30→            "3. 重新运行命令"
    31→        )
    32→
    33→
    34→class CaptchaBlockedError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    35→    """Raised when operation is blocked by captcha."""
    36→
    37→    def __init__(self):
    38→        super().__init__(
    39→            "检测到验证码阻塞!\n"
    40→            "请在浏览器窗口中完成验证，然后按回车继续\n\n"
    41→            "提示: 如果频繁出现验证码，请尝试:\n"
    42→            "  - 降低操作频率 (修改 config/settings.json 中的 rate_limits)\n"
    43→            "  - 增加延迟时间 (修改 delays.action_min/action_max)\n"
    44→            "  - 等待一段时间后再继续使用"
    45→        )
    46→
    47→
    48→class PermanentFailureError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    49→    """Raised when a send failure is deterministic and should not be retried.
    50→
    51→    Examples: no profile URL, VIP paywall, candidate already messaged.
    52→    """
    53→    pass
    54→
    55→
    56→class QuotaExhaustedError(PermanentFailureError):
    57→    """Raised when contact quota is exhausted."""
    58→
    59→    def __init__(self, remaining: int = 0):
    60→        super().__init__(
    61→            f"联系券已用尽 (剩余: {remaining})\n\n"
    62→            "解决方案:\n"
    63→            "  1. 等待配额恢复 (通常每日刷新)\n"
    64→            "  2. 升级脉脉会员以获取更多配额\n"
    65→            "  3. 使用 --dry-run 模式先搜索并保存候选人，稍后再发送"
    66→        )
    67→
    68→
    69→class RateLimitExceededError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    70→    """Raised when rate limit is exceeded."""
    71→
    72→    def __init__(self, action_type: str, wait_time: int, message: str = None):
    73→        self.action_type = action_type
    74→        self.wait_time = wait_time
    75→        if message is None:
    76→            message = f"Rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. Wait {wait_time} seconds."
    77→        super().__init__(message)
    78→
    79→
    80→class SelectorNotFoundError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    81→    """Raised when page selector is not found."""
    82→    pass
    83→
    84→
    85→class ExtractionError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    86→    """Raised when data extraction fails."""
    87→    pass
    88→
    89→
    90→class ConfigurationError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    91→    """Raised when configuration is invalid."""
    92→    pass
    93→
    94→
    95→class ValidationError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    96→    """Raised when input validation fails."""
    97→    pass
    98→

1→"""Shared captcha detection utility.
     2→
     3→Detects captcha elements on page and pauses for manual resolution.
     4→Used by auth and search modules.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import asyncio
     8→import sys
     9→
    10→from patchright.async_api import Page
    11→from loguru import logger
    12→from rich.console import Console
    13→
    14→console = Console()
    15→
    16→CAPTCHA_SELECTORS = [
    17→    '[class*="captcha"]',
    18→    '[class*="verify"]',
    19→    '[id*="captcha"]',
    20→    '[class*="slider"]',
    21→    '[class*="geetest"]',
    22→    'iframe[src*="captcha"]',
    23→]
    24→
    25→
    26→async def check_captcha(page: Page, report_to_rate_limiter: bool = False) -> None:
    27→    """Detect captcha elements on page and pause for manual resolution.
    28→
    29→    Args:
    30→        page: Playwright page instance
    31→        report_to_rate_limiter: If True, report captcha to adaptive rate limiter
    32→    """
    33→    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    34→        try:
    35→            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    36→            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    37→                if report_to_rate_limiter:
    38→                    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    39→                    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    40→                    rate_limiter.report_captcha()
    41→
    42→                # Raise specific error with helpful message
    43→                error = CaptchaBlockedError()
    44→                console.print(f"[bold red]{error}[/bold red]")
    45→                loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    46→                await loop.run_in_executor(None, sys.stdin.readline)
    47→                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    48→                return
    49→        except Exception as e:
    50→            # Log non-trivial errors (e.g. broken CDP connection) instead of
    51→            # silently swallowing them; timeouts are expected and stay quiet.
    52→            err_msg = str(e).lower()
    53→            if 'timeout' not in err_msg:
    54→                logger.debug(f"Captcha selector '{selector}' check error: {e}")
    55→            continue
    56→

1→"""Authentication module for Maimai login.
     2→
     3→In CDP mode, the user logs in manually in their own Chrome before running
     4→CLI commands. This module verifies login status and provides guidance
     5→if the user is not logged in.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import asyncio
     9→from typing import Optional
    10→
    11→from patchright.async_api import Page
    12→from loguru import logger
    13→from rich.console import Console
    14→from rich.panel import Panel
    15→
    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    18→from src.exceptions.errors import SessionExpiredError, LoginRequiredError
    19→
    20→console = Console()
    21→
    22→
    23→async def login(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
    24→    """
    25→    Verify login status in CDP-connected Chrome.
    26→
    27→    In CDP mode, the user is expected to already be logged in.
    28→    If not, instructions are printed for manual login in the browser.
    29→
    30→    Args:
    31→        browser: Browser manager instance (uses global if None)
    32→
    33→    Returns:
    34→        True if logged in
    35→    """
    36→    if browser is None:
    37→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    38→
    39→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP
    40→    page = await browser.start()
    41→
    42→    # Check if already logged in
    43→    if await check_login_status(page):
    44→        console.print("[green]Already logged in![/green]")
    45→        # Save session as backup
    46→        await browser.save_session()
    47→        return True
    48→
    49→    # Not logged in — guide the user
    50→    console.print(Panel(
    51→        "[bold]Not Logged In[/bold]\n\n"
    52→        "Please log in to Maimai in your Chrome browser:\n"
    53→        "1. Go to https://maimai.cn/login in Chrome\n"
    54→        "2. Scan QR code with Maimai app, OR\n"
    55→        "3. Enter phone number and verification code\n\n"
    56→        "[dim]Then run this command again to verify.[/dim]",
    57→        title="Maimai Login",
    58→        border_style="cyan"
    59→    ))
    60→
    61→    # Poll for login (user may log in while we wait)
    62→    # IMPORTANT: Do NOT call check_login_status() here — it navigates to
    63→    # search_center on every call, which resets the login page (kills QR code,
    64→    # clears phone input). Instead, watch the current URL for changes.
    65→    max_wait_seconds = 300  # 5 minutes timeout
    66→    poll_interval = 3
    67→    elapsed = 0
    68→
    69→    console.print("[dim]Waiting for login... (timeout: 5 minutes)[/dim]")
    70→
    71→    while elapsed < max_wait_seconds:
    72→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
    73→        elapsed += poll_interval
    74→
    75→        # Check for captcha
    76→        await check_captcha(page)
    77→
    78→        # Light check: see if user has navigated away from login page
    79→        current_url = page.url
    80→        if 'login' not in current_url.lower():
    81→            # User seems to have logged in — do a full verification
    82→            if await check_login_status(page):
    83→                console.print("[green]Login successful![/green]")
    84→                await browser.save_session()
    85→                console.print("[green]Session saved as backup[/green]")
    86→                return True
    87→
    88→    console.print("[red]Login timeout. Please log in manually and try again.[/red]")
    89→    return False
    90→
    91→
    92→async def check_login_status(page: Page) -> bool:
    93→    """
    94→    Check if user is currently logged in by navigating to a protected page
    95→    and observing whether Maimai redirects to the login page.
    96→
    97→    API probes can give false positives (server returns 200 but session is
    98→    actually stale). The redirect-based approach is reliable because Maimai's
    99→    server-side auth check only fires on real page navigations, and it will
   100→    redirect to the login page if the session is invalid.
   101→
   102→    Args:
   103→        page: Playwright page instance
   104→
   105→    Returns:
   106→        True if logged in (no redirect to login page)
   107→    """
   108→    try:
   109→        # Navigate to a protected page that requires authentication.
   110→        # The search center page reliably triggers server-side auth checks.
   111→        protected_url = "https://maimai.cn/web/search_center"
   112→        await page.goto(protected_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   113→
   114→        # Wait for any auth redirect to settle. Instead of a blind 3s wait,
   115→        # watch for URL changes (login redirect) with a shorter timeout.
   116→        try:
   117→            await page.wait_for_url(
   118→                lambda url: 'login' in url.lower(),
   119→                timeout=2000,
   120→            )
   121→            # If we get here, a redirect to login page happened — not logged in
   122→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=redirected_to_login (url={page.url})")
   123→            return False
   124→        except Exception:
   125→            # Timeout = no redirect happened, which is the happy path
   126→            pass
   127→
   128→        # Check 1: URL-based detection - did we get redirected to login?
   129→        final_url = page.url
   130→        if 'login' in final_url.lower():
   131→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=redirected_to_login (url={final_url})")
   132→            return False
   133→
   134→        # Check 2: Page content detection - look for login form elements
   135→        # even if URL didn't change (some login overlays don't change the URL)
   136→        is_login_page = await page.evaluate("""
   137→            () => {
   138→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   139→                const loginIndicators = [
   140→                    '欢迎使用脉脉',
   141→                    '登录/注册',
   142→                    '请输入手机号',
   143→                    '获取验证码',
   144→                    '扫码登录',
   145→                    '手机号登录'
   146→                ];
   147→                for (const indicator of loginIndicators) {
   148→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   149→                        return { is_login: true, matched: indicator };
   150→                    }
   151→                }
   152→
   153→                // Also check for login form elements in DOM
   154→                const loginForm = document.querySelector(
   155→                    'input[type="tel"], input[placeholder*="手机"], ' +
   156→                    '[class*="qrcode"], [class*="scan-login"]'
   157→                );
   158→                if (loginForm) {
   159→                    return { is_login: true, matched: 'login_form_element' };
   160→                }
   161→
   162→                return { is_login: false, matched: null };
   163→            }
   164→        """)
   165→
   166→        if is_login_page.get('is_login', False):
   167→            detail = is_login_page.get('matched', 'unknown')
   168→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=login_page_detected ({detail})")
   169→            return False
   170→
   171→        logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=True, detail=protected_page_accessible (url={final_url})")
   172→        return True
   173→
   174→    except Exception as e:
   175→        logger.error(f"Error checking login status: {e}")
   176→        return False
   177→
   178→
   179→async def ensure_logged_in(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
   180→    """
   181→    Ensure user is logged in, prompting for login if needed.
   182→
   183→    Args:
   184→        browser: Browser manager instance
   185→
   186→    Returns:
   187→        True if logged in (existing or new login)
   188→
   189→    Raises:
   190→        SessionExpiredError: If login fails
   191→    """
   192→    if browser is None:
   193→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   194→
   195→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP if not already connected
   196→    if not browser.is_running:
   197→        await browser.start()
   198→
   199→    # Check login status
   200→    if browser.page:
   201→        if await check_login_status(browser.page):
   202→            return True
   203→
   204→    # Not logged in — guide user
   205→    console.print("[yellow]Not logged in. Please log in to Maimai in your Chrome browser.[/yellow]")
   206→
   207→    if await login(browser):
   208→        return True
   209→
   210→    # Get CDP endpoint from browser config
   211→    from src.utils.config import get_config
   212→    config = get_config()
   213→    cdp_endpoint = config.get('browser.cdp_endpoint', 'http://localhost:9222')
   214→
   215→    raise LoginRequiredError(cdp_endpoint=cdp_endpoint)

1→"""Lightweight database migration system.
     2→
     3→Tracks schema versions in a dedicated table and applies incremental
     4→migrations on startup.  Each migration is a plain function that
     5→receives a SQLAlchemy connection.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→from typing import Callable, List, Tuple
     9→
    10→from sqlalchemy import text, inspect
    11→from loguru import logger
    12→
    13→
    14→# Migration registry: list of (version, description, migration_fn)
    15→# Append new migrations at the end; never reorder or remove existing entries.
    16→_migrations: List[Tuple[int, str, Callable]] = []
    17→
    18→
    19→def migration(version: int, description: str):
    20→    """Decorator to register a migration function."""
    21→    def decorator(fn: Callable):
    22→        _migrations.append((version, description, fn))
    23→        return fn
    24→    return decorator
    25→
    26→
    27→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28→#  Built-in migrations
    29→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30→
    31→@migration(1, "Initial schema — create core tables if missing")
    32→def _m001_initial_schema(conn):
    33→    """Ensure core tables exist (safe for existing databases)."""
    34→    # SQLAlchemy create_all is called before migrations, so tables should
    35→    # already exist.  This migration just marks the baseline version.
    36→    pass
    37→
    38→
    39→@migration(2, "Add retry_count column to messages table")
    40→def _m002_messages_retry_count(conn):
    41→    inspector = inspect(conn)
    42→    columns = [c["name"] for c in inspector.get_columns("messages")]
    43→    if "retry_count" not in columns:
    44→        conn.execute(text("ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0"))
    45→
    46→
    47→@migration(3, "Create web_tasks table for web service task tracking")
    48→def _m003_web_tasks(conn):
    49→    inspector = inspect(conn)
    50→    if "web_tasks" not in inspector.get_table_names():
    51→        conn.execute(text("""
    52→            CREATE TABLE web_tasks (
    53→                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    54→                task_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    55→                name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    56→                status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
    57→                priority VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'NORMAL',
    58→                user VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'anonymous',
    59→                params JSON,
    60→                result JSON,
    61→                error TEXT,
    62→                created_at TIMESTAMP,
    63→                started_at TIMESTAMP,
    64→                completed_at TIMESTAMP
    65→            )
    66→        """))
    67→        conn.execute(text("CREATE INDEX idx_web_tasks_task_id ON web_tasks (task_id)"))
    68→        conn.execute(text("CREATE INDEX idx_web_tasks_status ON web_tasks (status)"))
    69→
    70→
    71→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    72→#  Migration runner
    73→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    74→
    75→def _ensure_version_table(conn) -> None:
    76→    """Create the schema_version table if it doesn't exist."""
    77→    conn.execute(text("""
    78→        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
    79→            version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    80→            description TEXT NOT NULL,
    81→            applied_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    82→        )
    83→    """))
    84→    conn.commit()
    85→
    86→
    87→def _current_version(conn) -> int:
    88→    """Return highest applied migration version, or 0 if none."""
    89→    result = conn.execute(text("SELECT MAX(version) FROM schema_version"))
    90→    row = result.fetchone()
    91→    return row[0] or 0 if row else 0
    92→
    93→
    94→def run_migrations(engine) -> None:
    95→    """Apply all pending migrations against *engine*.
    96→
    97→    Called automatically by DatabaseManager.init_db().
    98→    """
    99→    with engine.connect() as conn:
   100→        _ensure_version_table(conn)
   101→        current = _current_version(conn)
   102→
   103→        pending = [(v, d, fn) for v, d, fn in _migrations if v > current]
   104→        if not pending:
   105→            logger.debug(f"Database schema is up-to-date (version {current})")
   106→            return
   107→
   108→        for version, description, fn in sorted(pending):
   109→            logger.info(f"Applying migration v{version}: {description}")
   110→            fn(conn)
   111→            conn.execute(
   112→                text("INSERT INTO schema_version (version, description) VALUES (:v, :d)"),
   113→                {"v": version, "d": description},
   114→            )
   115→            conn.commit()
   116→
   117→        final = _current_version(conn)
   118→        logger.info(f"Migrations complete — schema version {final}")
   119→

    69→MAIMAI_CHAT_URL = (

    71→)
    72→
    73→
    74→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    75→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    76→
    77→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    78→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    79→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    80→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    81→    """
    82→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    83→
    84→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    85→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    86→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    87→    for key in ("dstu", "u2", "egid"):
    88→        if key in params:
    89→            return params[key][0]
    90→    return None
    91→
    92→
    93→async def _navigate_to_chat(
    94→    page: Page,
    95→    profile_url: Optional[str],
    96→    config,
    97→    browser: BrowserManager,
    98→    maimai_id: str,
    99→    interactive: bool = False,
   100→    discovered_selectors=None,
   101→) -> bool:
   102→    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
   103→
   104→    Tries in order:
   105→    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params → direct chat URL
   106→    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL → direct chat URL
   107→    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
   108→
   109→    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
   110→
   111→    Args:
   112→        page: Playwright page instance
   113→        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
   114→        config: Config instance
   115→        browser: Browser manager instance
   116→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   117→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
   118→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
   119→
   120→    Returns:
   121→        True if successfully navigated to chat page
   122→    """
   123→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   124→
   125→    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
   126→    if not profile_url:
   127→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   128→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
   129→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
   130→
   131→        if not profile_url:
   132→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
   133→
   134→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   135→    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   136→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   137→
   138→    if user_id:
   139→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   140→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   141→        await async_random_delay("page_load")
   142→        return True
   143→
   144→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   145→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   146→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   147→    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   148→
   149→    current_url = page.url
   150→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   151→    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   152→    if redirected_user_id:
   153→        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   154→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   155→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   156→        await async_random_delay("page_load")
   157→        return True
   158→
   159→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   160→    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   161→    if chat_button_found:
   162→        await async_random_delay("action")
   163→        return True
   164→
   165→    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   166→    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   167→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   168→
   169→        console.print(
   170→            "[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]"
   171→        )
   172→        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   173→        if result.is_populated:
   174→            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   175→            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   176→            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   177→            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   178→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   179→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   180→            return True
   181→

  1018→def _make_search_center_sender(
  1019→    browser: BrowserManager,
  1020→    template_name: str,
  1021→    interactive: bool,
  1022→    discovered_selectors,
  1023→) -> Callable[[dict, str], Awaitable[CandidateSendResult]]:
  1024→    """Create a sender callback for search-center (Path A) with retry + timeout."""
  1025→
  1026→    max_retries = 2
  1027→    per_candidate_timeout = 90
  1028→
  1029→    async def _send(c: dict, content: str) -> CandidateSendResult:
  1030→        variables = {
  1031→            "name": c["name"],
  1032→            "company": c["company"],
  1033→            "position": c["title"],
  1034→        }
  1035→        last_error = None
  1036→        for attempt in range(1 + max_retries):
  1037→            try:
  1038→                success = await asyncio.wait_for(
  1039→                    send_message(
  1040→                        maimai_id=c["maimai_id"],
  1041→                        template_name=template_name,
  1042→                        variables=variables,
  1043→                        browser=browser,
  1044→                        skip_confirmation=True,
  1045→                        interactive=interactive,
  1046→                        discovered_selectors=discovered_selectors,
  1047→                        _skip_rate_check=True,
  1048→                        profile_url=c.get("profile_url"),
  1049→                    ),
  1050→                    timeout=per_candidate_timeout,
  1051→                )
  1052→                if success:
  1053→                    return CandidateSendResult(
  1054→                        success=True,
  1055→                        status="sent",
  1056→                        attempts=attempt + 1,
  1057→                        content=content,
  1058→                    )
  1059→                last_error = "send returned False"
  1060→
  1061→            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
  1062→                console.print(
  1063→                    f"[yellow]Timeout for {c['name']} ({c['maimai_id']}), skipping.[/yellow]"
  1064→                )
  1065→                return CandidateSendResult(
  1066→                    success=False,
  1067→                    status="failed",
  1068→                    reason=f"Timed out after {per_candidate_timeout}s",
  1069→                    attempts=attempt + 1,
  1070→                    content=content,
  1071→                )
  1072→            except QuotaExhaustedError as e:
  1073→                console.print(f"\n[red]联系券已用尽，终止批量发送[/red]")
  1074→                return CandidateSendResult(
  1075→                    success=False,
  1076→                    status="quota_exhausted",
  1077→                    reason=str(e),
  1078→                    attempts=attempt + 1,
  1079→                    content=content,
  1080→                    abort_batch=True,
  1081→                )
  1082→            except PermanentFailureError as e:
  1083→                console.print(f"[yellow]{e}. Skipping.[/yellow]")
  1084→                return CandidateSendResult(
  1085→                    success=False,
  1086→                    status="failed",
  1087→                    reason=str(e),
  1088→                    attempts=attempt + 1,
  1089→                    content=content,
  1090→                )
  1091→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
  1092→                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
  1093→                return CandidateSendResult(
  1094→                    success=False,
  1095→                    status="rate_limited",
  1096→                    reason=str(e),
  1097→                    attempts=attempt + 1,
  1098→                    content=content,
  1099→                    abort_batch=True,
  1100→                )
  1101→            except Exception as e:
  1102→                last_error = str(e)
  1103→
  1104→            # Retry with exponential backoff
  1105→            if attempt < max_retries:
  1106→                from src.utils.delays import get_retry_delay
  1107→
  1108→                delay = get_retry_delay(attempt, base_delay=3.0, max_delay=30.0)
  1109→                logger.info(f"Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries} for {c['name']} in {delay:.1f}s")
  1110→                await asyncio.sleep(delay)
  1111→
  1112→        # All retries exhausted
  1113→        actual_attempts = max_retries + 1
  1114→        logger.error(
  1115→            f"Failed to send message to {c['name']} after {actual_attempts} attempt(s): {last_error}"
  1116→        )
  1117→        return CandidateSendResult(
  1118→            success=False,
  1119→            status="failed",
  1120→            reason=last_error or "unknown error",
  1121→            attempts=actual_attempts,
  1122→            content=content,
  1123→        )
  1124→
  1125→    return _send
